name: RARE ELEMENT RESOURCES LTD
business: Rare Element Resources Ltd. is a mineral exploration and development company focused on rare earth elements. Its main assets include proprietary rare earth processing technology and a 100% interest in the Bear Lodge Property in Wyoming. The company is currently operating a Demonstration Plant to process and separate rare earth oxides from the Bear Lodge deposit.

exposures.sentence: The Company s main assets include its proprietary rare earth processing and/or beneficiation and separation technology and its 100% interest in a group of unpatented mining claims and ownership of adjacent private property, together known as the Bear Lodge Property.
Specifically, these REEs are used in hybrid and electric vehicle motors as well as in wind turbines.
Specifically, these REEs are used in hybrid and electric vehicle motors as well as in wind turbines.

the use of Nd, Pr, Tb and Dy in high-strength magnets that are critical to multiple defense applications, hybrid and electric vehicles and wind power generation facilities, particularly large offshore installations
the use of high-strength NdFeB magnets in the miniaturization of electronic products, including consumer devices, robotics, and emerging AI/data center technologies
the use of high-strength NdFeB magnets in the miniaturization of electronic products, including consumer devices, robotics, and emerging AI/data center technologies
the use of high-strength NdFeB magnets in the miniaturization of electronic products, including consumer devices, robotics, and emerging AI/data center technologies
the use of La in the fluid catalytic cracking process used by refineries

catalysts.event: Demonstration Plant operations formally commenced in early 2026
catalysts.sentence: Demonstration Plant operations formally commenced in early 2026 and are expected to continue through December 31, 2026.

catalysts.event: Demonstration Plant expected to produce up to 10 tons of NdPr oxide
catalysts.sentence: During the operations phase, the Demonstration Plant is expected to produce up to 10 tons of NdPr oxide.

catalysts.event: Remaining $400 WEA grant invoicing expected mid-2026
catalysts.sentence: The remaining $400 of the $4,400 grant total, which is conditioned on Demonstration Plant operations and a report to the WEA, will be invoiced to the WEA once that final milestone has been achieved, which is currently expected in mid-2026.

catalysts.event: Formal restart of Bear Lodge REE Project licensing and permitting
catalysts.sentence: In early 2026, the Company formally restarted the licensing and permitting of the Bear Lodge REE Project for both federal and state permitting.
On March 4, 2026, the Company closed the rights offering for gross proceeds of approximately $30,900

tamClaims.claim: Rare earth magnets accounted for over 80% of global REE market value (approximately $67.2 billion) in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: Overall, rare earth magnets accounted for about 41% of total TREO volume demand (76,903 tonnes or 84,771 tons) but over 80% of global REE market value (approximately $67.2 billion)

tamClaims.claim: Electric vehicle sales reached 18 million units in 2025, a 20% increase from 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: electric vehicle sales reached 18 million units, representing a 20% increase from 2024.

tamClaims.claim: Magnet applications' share of TREO demand expected to rise from 41% in 2025 to 49% by 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: Benchmark forecasts that magnet applications will continue to increase their share of overall demand for TREO rising from 41% in 2025 to 49% by 2030.
